docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $799.90 FILED BY CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT BECERRA, SANTIAGO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-31-2002 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
